info.name: Supreme Mobile App API
info.description:
Mobile guard app API for the whitelabel security workforce platform.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/api`
**Auth:** Sanctum bearer â€” run **01 - Authentication â†’ Login** first (tokens auto-saved).

### Collection variables (edit these)
| Variable | Used for |
|---|---|
| `base_url` | Host |
| `email` / `password` | Login |
| `device_id` / `device_name` / `device_os` / `app_version` | Device binding on login/logout |
| `latitude` / `longitude` / `address` / `accuracy` | GPS payloads |
| `access_token` / `refresh_token` | Auto-filled by Login / Refresh |
| `reset_code` / `reset_token` | Password reset flow |
| `shift_date_id`, `patrol_id`, `check_call_id`, â€¦ | Path IDs |

### Special procedures the app must handle
1. **Device change (security_staff):** Login with a new `device_id` â†’ **403** `{ requires_approval: true }`. No token. Wait for admin approval, then login again.
2. **Pending device change:** Same device already requested â†’ **403** `{ requires_approval: true, already_requested: true }`.
3. **Password reset:** Forgot â†’ Verify code (`reset_token`) â†’ Reset password.
4. **Email change:** PUT profile with new email â†’ pending admin approval (no immediate email update).
5. **Book on/off:** May require face verify + booking media when shift has no patrols/check-calls.

### Excluded (frontend-only, unguarded)
`/shifts`, `/shifts-with-staff`, `/shifts-by-site`, `/shifts-today`, `/client/{id}`, `/staff/{id}`, `/shift/{id}/locations`, `/dashboard-alerts`, `/emergency-alerts/{id}/acknowledge`, `/admin/profile-change-requests/*`, `/debug-request`

item.name: 01 - Authentication
item.description: Public auth endpoints + face verification (requires token).

request.description:
Authenticate guard. Tokens saved to collection vars on success.

### Request variables
| Field | Type | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|---|
| `email` | string | yes | `{{email}}` |
| `password` | string | yes | `{{password}}` |
| `device_info.device_id` | string | **yes** | `{{device_id}}` |
| `device_info.device_name` | string | no | `{{device_name}}` |
| `device_info.os` | string | no | `{{device_os}}` |
| `device_info.app_version` | string | no | `{{app_version}}` |
| `location.latitude` | number | no | `{{latitude}}` |
| `location.longitude` | number | no | `{{longitude}}` |

### Response variables (200)
| Field | Saved to |
|---|---|
| `access_token` | `{{access_token}}` |
| `refresh_token` | `{{refresh_token}}` |
| `user.id` | `{{user_id}}` |
| `user.role` | `{{user_role}}` |
| `user.email`, `user.name`, `user.profile` | response only |

### Procedure: Device change (security_staff only)
1. First login / empty device_id â†’ device logged, login proceeds.
2. Same `device_id` as last log â†’ login OK.
3. **New** `device_id` â†’ creates DeviceChangeRequest + admin notification â†’ **403**
   ```json
   { "message": "Device change detected. Admin approval required...", "requires_approval": true }
   ```
   App must show â€śwaiting for admin approvalâ€ť â€” **no token issued**.
4. Same new device already pending â†’ **403**
   ```json
   { "message": "...still pending...", "requires_approval": true, "already_requested": true }
   ```
5. After admin approves â†’ login again with same new `device_id` â†’ 200 + tokens.

### Other statuses
- **401** `{ "message": "Invalid credentials" }`

response.name: 403 â€” Device change (new request)
403 â€” Device change already pending

request.description:
Revoke current Sanctum token; clear refresh token + device log.

### Request variables
| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `device_info.device_id` | no | `{{device_id}}` â€” removes device log; rejects pending device-change for that device |
| `refresh_token` | no | `{{refresh_token}}` â€” removes cached refresh |

### Response (200)
`{ "message": "Logged out successfully" }`

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`.

Exchange refresh token for new access + refresh (old refresh invalidated). TTL 30 days.

### Request
| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `refresh_token` | yes | `{{refresh_token}}` |

### Response (200) â€” auto-saves tokens
| Field | Variable |
|---|---|
| `access_token` | `{{access_token}}` |
| `refresh_token` | `{{refresh_token}}` |

- **401** `{ "message": "Invalid refresh token" }`
- **404** `{ "message": "User not found" }`

### Procedure: Password reset (3 steps)
1. **Forgot Password** â†’ email 6-digit code
2. **Verify Reset Code** â†’ get `reset_token` (saved to `{{reset_token}}`)
3. **Reset Password** â†’ set `new_password`

### Request
| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | yes | `{{email}}` |

### Response (200) â€” always 200 (even unknown email)
`{ "message": "Reset code sent to your email." }` or `"This email is not existed in our records."`

response.name: 200 â€” Unknown email

request.description:
### Request
| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | yes | `{{email}}` |
| `code` | yes | `{{reset_code}}` â€” 6-digit from email |

### Response (200)
| Field | Variable |
|---|---|
| `reset_token` | `{{reset_token}}` (auto-saved, 30 min TTL) |
| `message` | `"Code verified"` |

- **422** `{ "message": "Invalid or expired code." }`

### Request
| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | yes | `{{email}}` |
| `reset_token` | yes | `{{reset_token}}` from verify step |
| `new_password` | yes | `{{new_password}}` â€” min 6 chars |

### Response (200)
`{ "message": "Password reset successfully" }`
- **422** invalid/expired reset token
- **404** user not found

Face check before book-on / book-off. Requires auth.

### Request
| Field | Required | Notes / Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `image` | yes | base64 / data-URL â€” `{{face_image_base64}}` |
| `action` | yes | `book_on` \| `book_off` |
| `location.latitude` | no | `{{latitude}}` |
| `location.longitude` | no | `{{longitude}}` |
| `location.address` | no | `{{address}}` |

### Response (200)
| Field | Type |
|---|---|
| `verified` | boolean |
| `confidence_score` | number |
| `message` | string |

### Response fields
`id`, `email`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `phone`, `address`, `emergency_contact`, `bank_details`, `face_data`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

### Request (all optional)
`email`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `phone`, `address`,
`emergency_contact.{name,phone,relationship}`,
`bank_details.{account_name,account_number,sort_code,bank_name}`

### Procedure: Email change
If `email` differs from current â†’ creates ProfileChangeRequest + admin notify.
Response: `{ "message": "Email change request submitted for admin approval" }` â€” email NOT updated yet.
If email already taken â†’ **422** `{ "message": "Email already in use" }`

### Response (normal update)
`{ "message": "Profile updated successfully", "approval_id": "approval_xxxx" }`

response.name: 200 â€” Email change pending

request.description:
### Request
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `images` | yes â€” array of base64 strings (min 1) |

### Response
`{ "message": "Face data uploaded successfully." }`

### Response
`{ documents: [{ id, type, filename, status, description, expiry_date, uploaded_at, admin_comments }] }`
`status`: pending | approved | rejected (typical)

### Request (multipart/form-data)
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `document_type` | yes | `sia_licence_file`, `passport_file`, `proof_of_address_file`, `proof_of_address_file_2`, `ni_letter_file`, `first_aid_certificate_file`, `act_certificate_file`, `driving_licence_file`, `other` |
| `file[]` | yes | PDF/JPG/PNG max 10MB each |
| `expiry_date` | no | YYYY-MM-DD |
| `description` | no | string |

### Response
`{ documents: [...], uploaded_at }` â€” each doc starts as `status: pending`

Pollable alerts for the guard app badge / inbox.

### Response
`{ alerts: [...] }` â€” alert `type` examples:
- `document_expiry` â€” `{ document_id, title, message, expiry_date, days_remaining }`
- `patrol_warning` / `patrol_missed` / `patrol_missed_pending` â€” `{ patrol_id, ... }`
- `checkcall_warning` / `checkcall_missed` / `checkcall_missed_pending` â€” `{ checkcall_id, ... }`

### Response
`{ "count": number }`

### Query
| Param | Variable / Values |
|---|---|
| `limit` | page size (default 50) |
| `category` | `past` \| `current` \| `upcoming` |
| `order` | `asc` \| `desc` |

### Response `shift_dates[]` key fields
`id` (= shift_date_id â†’ save as `{{shift_date_id}}`), `shift_id`, `site_id`, `site_name`, `site_address`,
`start_time`, `end_time`, `shift_date`, `duties`, `supervisor_name`, `supervisor_contact`, `status`,
`category`, `trainings[]`, `note`, `requires_booking_media_for_book_on`, `requires_booking_media_for_book_off`,
`briefing_pdf`, `risk_assessment_pdf`

### Procedure: Booking media flags
If `requires_booking_media_for_book_on/off` is true â†’ call **Upload Booking Media** before/after book on/off.

### Query: `category` = past|current|upcoming
### Response: `{ count: number }` (or similar count payload)
Unpaginated all shifts for calendar UI. Same item shape as List Shifts.

### Path
`{{shift_date_id}}` â€” **shift_dates.id**, not shifts.id

Same object shape as list item + in-progress patrol if any.

### Path: `{{shift_date_id}}`

### Request
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `response` | yes | `accept` \| `decline` |
| `reason` | if decline | string |

### Errors
409 already accepted / booked on / ended

### Path: `{{shift_date_id}}`
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `risk_assessment_read` | yes boolean |
| `assignment_instructions_read` | yes boolean |
| `acknowledgment_timestamp` | no date |

### Response: `{ "message": "Documents acknowledged" }`

### Path: `{{shift_date_id}}`

### Request
| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `location.latitude` | yes | `{{latitude}}` |
| `location.longitude` | yes | `{{longitude}}` |

### Procedure
1. Optionally run Face Verify (`action=book_on`).
2. If list says `requires_booking_media_for_book_on` â†’ POST `/booking-media` first.
3. Book On.
4. Poll `/shift-status` for `on-duty`.

### Common errors
Already on another shift / not assigned / geofence / face / timing windows

### Path: `{{shift_date_id}}`
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `location.latitude` | yes |
| `location.longitude` | yes |

Must be booked on this shift first. May need booking media for book_off.

### Response
| Field | Values |
|---|---|
| `status` | `on-duty` \| `off-duty` |
| `shift_date` | full shift object or null |
| `patrol_id` | in-progress patrol id or null |
| `message` | string |
Current Monâ€“Sun worked hours for ended shifts (`is_assign=4`).

query.description: YYYY â€” or use start_month + end_month (YYYY-MM)

request.description:
### Query (pick one mode)
| Params | Format |
|---|---|
| `year` | `YYYY` |
| `start_month` + `end_month` | `YYYY-MM` |

Max range: last 5 years.

### Request
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `start_date` | yes | datetime, after_or_equal now |
| `end_date` | yes | >= start_date |
| `reason` | yes | string |
| `type` | yes | `annual_leave` \| `sick_leave` \| `unpaid_leave` \| `other_leave` |
| `hours` | no | number >= 0 |
| `shift_id` | no | optional link |
All leave requests for authenticated employee.

### Path: leave request id (use `{{leave_request_id}}`)
404 if not found / not yours.

### Response
`user_id`, `total_hours`, `used_hours`, `available_hours`, `unpaid_hours` (and related fields)

### Response
`{ upcoming_alarms: [{ shift_id, type, scheduled_time, alarm_time, acknowledged }] }`

### Path: `{{alarm_id}}`
### Response: `{ "message": "Alarm acknowledged" }`

### Path: `{{shift_date_id}}`
### Response: `{ check_calls: [...] }`

### Path: `{{check_call_id}}`

### Request
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `location.latitude` / `longitude` | yes |
| `notes` | no |
| `timestamp` | no |
| `media[]` | required if check call `require_media=1` â€” `{ timestamp, media_file }` |

Window: typically 5 min before â†’ 15 min after scheduled time.
Already completed â†’ 404; missed without admin override â†’ 422.
Pending overdue check-call alarms for current guard.

### Request
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `guard_id` | yes â€” users.id |
| `phone_number` | yes |
| `timestamp` | no |

### Path: `{{shift_date_id}}`
List patrols + checkpoints for the shift.
### Path: `{{patrol_id}}`

### Path: `{{patrol_id}}`
Cannot start before scheduled `start_time`.
Requires lat/lng.

### Path: `{{patrol_id}}`
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `scan_data` | yes | QR/NFC payload â€” `{{scan_data}}` |
| `scan_method` | yes | `qr` \| `nfc` |
| `location.latitude/longitude` | yes |
| `media_files` | no | array |
| `notes` / `issues_found` | no |

### Path: `{{patrol_id}}`
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `summary` | yes |
| `total_checkpoints` | yes int |
| `completed_checkpoints` | yes int |
| `issues_reported` | yes int |
| `location.latitude/longitude` | yes |
| `location.address` | no |

### Path: `{{patrol_id}}`
`media[]`: `{ media_file, timestamp }` â€” file or base64.
`location.latitude/longitude` required.
List DOB entries for authenticated guard.

### Request (single)
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `shift_id` | no | shift_dates.id â€” `{{shift_date_id}}` |
| `entry_type` | yes | `incident`\|`observation`\|`maintenance`\|`visitor`\|`other` |
| `title` / `description` | yes |
| `location.latitude/longitude` | yes |
| `timestamp` | no |
| `media_files` | no | files or base64 |

### Bulk alternative
`{ "dobs": [ { ...same fields... }, ... ] }` â†’ `{ message, created }`

### Response (single): `{ entry_id, message }` **201**
### Path: `{{dob_id}}`
Same fields as create; owner-only. Path: `{{dob_id}}`
Incidents for authenticated user.

### Request
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `category` | yes | theft\|assault\|fire\|medical\|property_damage\|suspicious_activity\|other |
| `severity` | yes | low\|medium\|high\|critical |
| `title` / `description` | yes |
| `location.latitude/longitude/address` | yes |
| `shift_id` | no |
| `people_involved[].role` | if present | witness\|victim\|suspect\|staff\|visitor |
| `pre_captured_media` / `live_media` | no |

âš ď¸Ź Route typo in backend: registered as `/incidents ` (trailing space). Collection uses `/incidents`.
### Path: `{{incident_id}}`
Update existing incident. Path: `{{incident_id}}`. `shift_id` required on update (exists:shifts,id).

### Response `conversations[]`
`id` â†’ save as `{{conversation_id}}`, `type`, `name`, `participants[]`, `last_message`, `unread_count`

### Path: `{{conversation_id}}`
### Query: `limit` (default 50)
### Response: `{ messages: [{ id, sender_id, sender_name, message, message_type, attachment, timestamp, read_by, deleted }] }`

| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `conversation_id` | yes â€” `{{conversation_id}}` |
| `message` | required_without attachment |
| `attachment` | no â€” base64 data URL or file |

### Response: `{ message_id, attachment }` â€” save `message_id` â†’ `{{message_id}}`

`message_ids`: int[] of messages.id
Response: `{ "message": "marked as read" }`

| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `participants` | yes â€” user ids array |
| `name` | no â€” for groups |

1 participant â†’ direct (returns existing if already exists: `existing: true`).
2+ â†’ group.

### Response: `{ conversation_id, type, name, participants }` â†’ save `{{conversation_id}}`

### Query: `name`, `role` (optional fuzzy)
Excludes users you already have a direct chat with. Paginated.
### Response: `[{ id, role }]`

Background GPS ping while on duty.

| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `latitude` / `longitude` / `accuracy` | yes | `{{latitude}}` `{{longitude}}` `{{accuracy}}` |
| `on_duty` | yes boolean |
| `timestamp` | no |
| `shiftdate_id` | no | `{{shift_date_id}}` â€” enables geofence |
| `patrol_id` | no | `{{patrol_id}}` |

### Response
`{ status, location_id, outside_site, outside_message }`
If outside site radius (when restrict enabled) â†’ `outside_site: true` + control notified.

response.name: 200 â€” Outside site

request.description:
### Query
| Param | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `date_from` | yes | `{{date_from}}` |
| `date_to` | yes | `{{date_to}}` |
| `shift_id` | no |

Only points with accuracy â‰¤ 200.

Notify control when GPS disabled. Throttled (~30 min).
Response: `{ status, message }`

### Response
`idle_minutes`, `alerts_sent` (`guard_notified` at 15m, `control_notified` at 30m)
or `{ message, idle_status: "unknown" }` if no location yet.

| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `shift_date_id` | yes | `{{shift_date_id}}` |
| `type` | yes | `book_on` \| `book_off` |
| `location.latitude/longitude` | yes |
| `media_files` | no | base64 data URLs or multipart files |

Used when shift has no patrols/check-calls and list flag requires media.

| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `location.latitude/longitude/address` | yes |
| `enable_device_alarm` | yes boolean |
| `message` | no |
| `timestamp` | no |

Save returned alert id â†’ `{{emergency_alert_id}}` for cancel.

### Path: `{{emergency_alert_id}}`
### Request: `{ reason }` required
Must be alert owner. Already cancelled â†’ 400.

### Query
`date_from`, `date_to` (required), `invoiced` optional boolean
Use `{{date_from}}` / `{{date_to}}`.

| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `shift_ids` | yes array |
| `invoice_period.date_from/date_to` | yes |
| `total_amount` | yes number |
| `notes` | no |

### Query: `status` (submitted|under_review|approved|paid), `page`, `limit`
Save invoice id â†’ `{{invoice_id}}`

### Path: `{{invoice_id}}`
`accepted` boolean required, `notes` optional.
400 if no revision pending.

### Path: `{{invoice_id}}`
Returns PDF binary (`Accept: application/pdf`).

### Response `{ materials: [{ id, title, type, content_url, pdf_url, required, acknowledged, implementation_date, complete_by_date, acknowledge_by_date, created_at }] }`
Save `id` â†’ `{{training_id}}`
### Path: `{{training_id}}`

### Path: `{{training_id}}`
| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `acknowledged_at` | no date |
| `completion_time_seconds` | no int >= 1 |

Already acknowledged â†’ **400**

### Query
| Param | Values |
|---|---|
| `type` | alarm\|message\|alert\|approval |
| `read` | true/false string |
| `page` / `limit` | pagination |

### Response
`{ notifications, pagination: { current_page, last_page, per_page, total } }`
Save notification `id` â†’ `{{notification_id}}`

### Path: `{{notification_id}}`
### Response: `{ "message": "Notification marked as read" }`

| Field | Required | Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `push_token` | yes | `{{push_token}}` |
| `platform` | yes | `ios` \| `android` â€” `{{platform}}` |

Token moved to this user if previously owned by another.

### Response
`{ availability: [{ day_of_week, period, start, end }] }`
`period`: Day (07:00â€“19:00) | Night (19:00â€“07:00) | Custom
`day_of_week`: 0=Sunday â€¦ 6=Saturday

| Field | Required |
|---|---|
| `availability` | yes array 1â€“7 |
| `availability[].dayOfWeek` | yes 0â€“6 |
| `availability[].period` | no | `Day` \| `Night` â€” omit = unavailable |

Days not in payload are cleared (unavailable). Notifies admin.

item.name: 17 - Admin (Mobile Admin Role)
item.description: Endpoints requiring auth:sanctum â€” typically used by admin users on mobile or supervisor apps.

request.description:
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `guard_id` | yes | string id |
| `message` | yes |
| `priority` | yes | low\|medium\|high\|urgent |
| `trigger_alarm` | yes boolean |

### Path: message id
### Body: `{ reason }` required

### Path: DOB entry id
`title`, `description`, `edit_reason` all required.

### Path: `{{alarm_id}}`
`reason` string + `resolved` boolean required.
